title: Feleph 260 Pieces Masonry Bricks Set Multicolored Building Blocks for Wall MOC Parts and Pieces Diverse Bulk Toy Set Compatible with Major Brands
features: This brick set has 260pcs bricks in total , includes 120pcs of 1x2 brick, 28pcs of 1x3 brick, 70pcs of 1x4 brick, 42pcs of L corner brick. Please note: It is only the masonry bricks that are offered for sale, don't include the windows and doors.
This building set is very diverse, you can use this set for your building needs, such as building a house, defensive walls, it will be fun!
Stimulate the imagination and building skills, your child may become an engineer in the future
Safe and harmless ABS material, very durable, compatible with the major brand.
Small pieces and parts, not suitable for kids under 4, please play under adult's supervision.
description: Product Description This set of wall bricks contains a variety of shapes that you can use to build all kinds of ideal structures such as castles, houses, defence walls, etc., which will stimulate the imagination and building skills! This brick set is compatible with the major brand. Note: this item doesn't include the flag, windows and doors, it's just the masonry brick set. This set comes in many shapes and colors, 260 pieces in total, you can build all kinds of walls you want Small pieces and parts, not suitable for kids under 4, please for use under adult supervision.
